name: Chocolate Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, allow the egg whites to come to room temperature, which may take about an hour. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
In a small bowl, mix cocoa with boiling water until smooth and let it cool for approximately 20 minutes.
In another bowl, combine flour, Sugar Twin, baking soda, and Lite salt. Make a well in the center and pour in the liquid Butter Buds, Eggbeaters, Vanilla, and cooled cocoa mixture. Beat until smooth using an electric mixer.
Sprinkle Cream of tartar over the egg whites. Using an electric mixer, beat on high speed until stiff peaks form. Do not overbeat.
Pour the batter into a 10-inch tube pan. Bake for 65-70 minutes at 325°F. Invert the pan over the neck of a bottle to cool completely, which may take about 1 ½ hours. Using a spatula, carefully loosen the cake from the pan and remove it.
